name: Purrito Cat
description: Adorable cat curled up snugly in a burrito wrap. A viral print design that makes a charming and humorous desk mascot or gift. Always gets a smile.

name: Articulated Dragon
description: Fully articulated print-in-place dragon with every segment independently movable. Flexible, detailed, and endlessly fidgetable. Printed as one piece with no assembly required.

name: Brave Cat Figurine
description: Highly detailed sitting cat figurine from the Luulia collection, Amur variant. Expressive pose and fine surface detail make it a standout desk companion or collector's piece.

name: Custom Figurine
description: Fully custom AI-generated portrait figurine. A unique, personalized collectible or gift. Fine detail and smooth finish capture individual features with remarkable accuracy.

name: Arsenal Embossed Keychain
description: Embossed Arsenal football club crest keychain. Bold relief design with clean lines, perfect for fans. Durable PLA with a premium finish in any of our 10 colors.

name: FC Barcelona Emblem
description: Large 130x130mm FC Barcelona crest in detailed relief. Wall-mountable or display-ready. A must-have for Barca fans, printed in vibrant team colors or any custom shade.

name: Mercedes Keychain
description: Mercedes AMG F1 team inspired keychain featuring the iconic three-pointed star logo. Slim, lightweight, and durable. Perfect gift for F1 and Mercedes fans.

name: Real Madrid Keychain
description: Sleek Real Madrid club crest keychain with detailed relief carving of the iconic logo. Clean finish and lightweight build. Perfect for Madridistas everywhere.

name: Ronaldo Keycap
description: Custom CR7-themed keyboard keycap for mechanical keyboards. A unique way to show off your fandom. Compatible with Cherry MX and most standard switches.

name: F1 Logo
description: The iconic Formula 1 logo in crisp embossed relief. Perfect wall art or desk decor for motorsport enthusiasts. Clean geometric design looks great in any color.

name: F1 Stand
description: Display stand designed in the style of the Formula 1 logo. Ideal desk decor or trophy base for motorsport fans. Sturdy enough to hold small collectibles.

name: Wavelength
description: Abstract sinusoidal wave sculpture with clean, flowing curves. A modern minimalist statement piece that catches light beautifully. Elevates any shelf or desk instantly.

name: Hex Fidget (Two Color)
description: Hexagonal fidget toy with interlocking pieces that click and slide smoothly. The two-color variant adds visual flair. Compact, near-silent, and great for focus and stress relief.

name: Spiral Cone Fidget
description: Two-part spiral cone fidget that threads together with a satisfying twist action. Mesmerizing to spin and unscrew. Aesthetically striking and meditative to play with.

name: Universal Phone Stand
description: Sleek universal phone stand with smooth rounded edges for scratch-free use. Compatible with all phone sizes. A clean, minimal desk accessory that keeps your phone at the perfect angle.

name: SKADIS Pegboard Accessory
description: Custom-fit accessory for the IKEA SKADIS pegboard system. Snaps directly onto the pegboard pins for a secure hold. Keep your workspace organized with a perfect-fitting holder.

name: Custom Precision Part
description: Precision-engineered custom part designed in Onshape. Tight tolerances and crisp edges make it suitable for functional and mechanical applications. Bring your own CAD and we'll print it.
